label: 568_public investment_public capital_investment efficiency_investment spending
description: Discussions focus on the productivity of public infrastructure spending in developing countries. Analysts debate how efficiently public capital is used and its impact on growth, especially in low-income nations with significant infrastructure deficits.

central_articles.title: Public investment efficiency and growth
central_articles.excerpt: What is the growth impact of an increase in the rate of public investment spending? And in particular, how does this depend on the efficiency of public investment spending? central_articles.title: Roads to nowhere or bridges to growth: What do we know about public investment efficiency in developing countries?
central_articles.excerpt: The broad consensus is that the massive infrastructure deficit in many developing countries is a key bottleneck to their growth prospects.
